title: Inheritance Super
description: Create a subclass and use the super keyword to call the parent constructor.
problemStatement:
Inheritance allows code reuse. Create a parent class `Animal` with a constructor that takes `String name`. Then create a subclass `Dog` that extends `Animal`. Use `super(name)` in the `Dog` constructor. Print the name of a new `Dog` instance.

**Expected Output:** `Buddy`.
hints: The `super()` call must be the first line in the subclass constructor.
